message:
test(char-props,umask): add 18+7 tests for emoji presentation and nerd fonts (wa-282k6)

char-props/emoji: 13 tests covering Presentation enum traits, for_char
with ASCII/emoji/rocket codepoints, for_grapheme with plain text/emoji/
variation selectors/ZWJ sequences/empty input.

char-props/nerdfonts: 5 tests verifying map population, size consistency
with source data, lookup roundtrip, and nonexistent key handling.

umask: 7 tests for UmaskSaver new/default/drop restore, saved_umask
lifecycle, and nested saver correctness.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
